metadata.description: AI agent skills that build and run your business autonomously — from idea to revenue, 24/7.

plugins.name: money
plugins.description: Main entry point — onboards you, builds your profile, and routes to the right skill.

plugins.name: money-discover
plugins.description: Find and validate profitable business ideas with competitive intelligence.

plugins.name: money-strategy
plugins.description: Premise deconstruction + market research + business model stress test + GTM plan.

plugins.name: money-diagnose
plugins.description: Deep diagnosis when business is stuck — root cause, not symptoms. Includes execution coaching.

plugins.name: money-product
plugins.description: Build, deploy, QA test, and monitor an MVP with landing page, auth, payments, SEO/GEO.

plugins.name: money-quality
plugins.description: Code review, security audit, performance check, accessibility — pre-launch quality gates.

plugins.name: money-content
plugins.description: Content pipeline with authenticity audit, headline impact matrix, and substance scoring.

plugins.name: money-outreach
plugins.description: Cold email sequences, partnership outreach, and lead generation with personalization.

plugins.name: money-social
plugins.description: Social media management — X, LinkedIn, Reddit, Product Hunt — with hook-writing frameworks.

plugins.name: money-seo
plugins.description: Traditional SEO + GEO (AI search optimization for ChatGPT, Perplexity, Gemini).

plugins.name: money-ads
plugins.description: Google Ads, Meta Ads — campaign setup, optimization, ROAS tracking.

plugins.name: money-ops
plugins.description: 24/7 autonomous operations with health scoring, canary monitoring, and safety guardrails.

plugins.name: money-finance
plugins.description: Revenue tracking, unit economics, financial reports — Stripe integration.

plugins.name: money-save
plugins.description: Checkpoint the current business state to disk for cross-session recall — never lose context again.

plugins.name: money-restore
plugins.description: Resume from a prior saved state — pick up exactly where the last session left off.

plugins.name: money-report
plugins.description: Merge all saved states into a deliverable markdown report — share with co-founders, advisors, or your future self.

plugins.name: money-panel
plugins.description: Run all four reviewers (investor / customer / operator / skeptic), find agreement, surface only disagreements + taste decisions. One command = full plan-review gauntlet.

plugins.name: money-review-investor
plugins.description: VC-mode review of a business plan. Verdict modes: SEED VIABLE / LATER ROUND ONLY / BOOTSTRAP-ONLY / UNFUNDABLE. Five questions: founder-market fit, demand evidence, moat theory, TAM math, founder risk.

plugins.name: money-review-customer
plugins.description: Customer-mode review. First-person verdict from the named ICP on whether they'd pay this price for this solution. Verdict modes: PAY NOW / PAY WITH FRICTION / WRONG POSITIONING / WRONG ICP.

plugins.name: money-review-operator
plugins.description: Solo-founder execution review. Verdict modes: SHIPPABLE NOW / SHIPPABLE WITH DESCOPE / NEEDS HIRE / WRONG STACK. Checks build complexity, ops load, runway, channel feasibility.

plugins.name: money-review-skeptic
plugins.description: Devil's advocate review. Seven attack vectors, top-3 risk ranking, and the single avoided question the user has been polite about. Verdict modes: EXISTENTIAL RISK / SOLVABLE RISKS / LOW-RISK / WRONG QUESTION.

plugins.name: money-learn
plugins.description: Manage atomic project learnings (~/.smtm/projects/{slug}/learnings.jsonl). Auto-loaded into every other money-* skill so the agent gets smarter across sessions instead of cold-starting.

plugins.name: money-retro
plugins.description: Weekly business retrospective. Reads snapshots, learnings, skill-usage telemetry. Surfaces stalled hypotheses, unused skills, and one recommended focus for the coming week. Portfolio mode aggregates across all projects.

plugins.name: money-skillify
plugins.description: Codify a successful workflow from the current conversation into a permanent project-local skill at ~/.smtm/projects/{slug}/skills/. Future sessions can reference it without re-discovery.

plugins.name: money-upgrade
plugins.description: Update Show Me The Money to the latest version.
